prompt: Look up two records without changing either one: the claim “Basement Water Claim” at West Office, and “Kitchen Leak Claim” at North Office. Report each stable ID, date, and status. Write every date as YYYY-MM-DD and do not add details the tools did not return.

follow_up_turns.content: Move only the first claim, “Basement Water Claim,” to 2026-10-10. Leave “Kitchen Leak Claim” untouched and do not send a notification.
Date correction for “Basement Water Claim” only: use 2026-11-14. The other record must remain unchanged.

stages.purpose: Run two independent record lookups in one assistant action.
Change only the first record named by the follow-up.
Apply the corrected date to that same first record.

response_constraints: Base every reported field and confirmation on tool results.
Use the resolved target ID for both update turns; do not repeat the search after the correction.
Do not call the notification or cancellation tools.
Write every date as YYYY-MM-DD and do not add details the tools did not return.
Report both lookup results before the follow-up.
Never imply that the comparison record was updated.
The two initial searches must be issued together because neither depends on the other.
